---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Contact information for Juncheng Zhang"
title-block-banner: false
---

I am happy to hear from researchers, students, and anyone interested in experimental and behavioural economics.

**Juncheng Zhang**  
School of Economics  
University of Nottingham Ningbo China
201, Trent building  
199 Taikang East Road  
Ningbo, 315100, China

**Email:** [Juncheng.ZHANG@nottingham.edu.cn](mailto:Juncheng.ZHANG@nottingham.edu.cn)
